name: anygen
description: AI-powered content creation suite: slides, documents, diagrams, websites, data visualizations, reports, and more

name: nimclaw-web-search
description: Web search using NimClaw's built-in web_search tool

name: nimclaw-web-fetch
description: Fetch and extract web page content using NimClaw's built-in web_fetch tool

name: nimclaw-doc-parse
description: Parse documents (PDF, Word, Excel, PPT) via AnyGen upload or local CLI tools

name: nimclaw-image-understanding
description: Analyze and describe images using vision-capable LLM or Ollama multimodal model

name: nimclaw-text-gen-image
description: Generate images from text descriptions via AnyGen ai_designer operation

name: nimclaw-speech-to-text
description: Convert audio to text via Groq Whisper API or Ollama
